transcript.text: This meeting is being recorded.
Yeah, doing all right.
A little bit of catch up this week after after holidays and all that good stuff.
Yeah, it's possible I owe you stuff.
I've just been busy with many other things.
It is OK.
I we owe you some things, too, which is one of one of the pieces I wanted to talk about.
So all good.
And I think a lot of what we owe you is the that sort of revised proposal that you and Marcel talked about over the holidays.
Wanted to flag that's high priority for me working on it this evening.
One of my one of my to do is after this call.
So we're going to have that over to you guys ASAP so we can kind of continue renewal conversation.
Go, no, go engage where all of that's at.
But before I totally derail myself, me share my.
Let me screen the agenda really quick.
Cool.
Perfect.
And I'll send a link over to this after the call as well.
I know I sent a long async.
Update.
This is kind of a repeat of some of that with a few additional updates.
We've got five articles that we've staged that are ready for your final review.
My publishing team is still having trouble accessing the products in your CMS.
I can send you a screenshot of what they see.
Basically, it's just locked out with no options for them to select.
So not sure if that's like a permissions issue, but it's fine.
I can just take that on.
It's not.
It's not a huge deal.
Cool.
Just want to reduce your lift where we can.
And we've got another batch that are revised and we'll be going to staging next week.
And there's one more on this list that was, it's listed currently as staged, but we don't have a preview link for it.
So we're just making sure that that one's done.
And I'll post around all of this at the end of the day too.
Um, and like we had talked about in December, kind of helping clear that backlog, going through all this link checking.
we're And we're to
We should have all of the articles that were pending link checking done by the end of next week.
We've got a big batch coming to you this week, which is listed here.
A lot of those are getting done today.
So those will be over to you soon.
And then the rest of them should be over next week.
And I updated our Airtable just for a little bit more cohesion for my team as well.
So anything that came back to us that was originally with you guys for review, I flagged as a return for link checking.
And then my team's done with it.
They're putting back on a week.
But I will post a roundup of all of these for you in our channel as well for visibility.
Okay.
Questions there?
Cool.
And regulatory review update, because I know that has been a long time coming.
We have a pretty robust step that has been implemented, and we're doing some final testing on it.
If you wanted a quick break.
Basically, we're looking for problematic words, in part based on documentation that you guys have shared and pulling on Maggie's prompt.
We're also looking for any disease language to make sure that that stays compliant, readjusting that wording where we need to, and hedging phrases around any research claims.
And then one thing for us, it also flags when studies or like dosages have a mismatch for us to review.
And this all happens before the MD tagging step.
So ideally, this is catching the majority of things that would then need to be reviewed.

We're aiming for like at least 95% compliance within all of these like really high priority steps and that any of the like glaring edits that would trigger, you know, massive compliance issues don't get through at all.
So within that, we have done some testing with articles that we know have some issues with, you know, problematic wording and claims that are too strong and things like that.
Our next step is to run through like a completely new article and make sure that output, like tone and everything are consistent with what we've been producing.
So we're maintaining that like same high bar of quality for you guys.

And then I also want us to, on my team, to look into what it would look like for us to rerun articles that are currently with you guys for review to potentially help reduce that lift so that you guys aren't having to do that regulatory step as detailed.
I just want to make sure that if we rerun that step, that it's not going to skew a lot of other things.
And we'll need to gauge how many articles we could potentially do for you in a week to push that through.
Okay.
Cool.
But it sounds like with whatever sort of sauce you guys are sort of adding to it, seems like it's having sort of a net positive impact on the pipeline, adding that stuff.
Yeah.
Yeah.
So far it seems like it's working and, you know, like I've highlighted.
it's it's
We're just trying to make sure that it all works in cohesion with where we've slotted it in.
But our initial tests are promising, so that's a good sign.
And I mentioned that growth strategy is in the works.
know you guys talked about making sure that there's some suggested roadmaps and clear milestones we'd want to hit to help you guys make the decision on if this makes sense to go forward or not.
So that should be over to you.
I'll keep you updated and ping you as soon as that's ready.
And just wanted to highlight, you know, obviously very early in everything, but blog-specific content, we're starting to see an uptick in sessions, which is great.

So this just looks at, like, early December, and this is just our blog content, not the site-wide, but, you know, nice to see, especially over the week of Christmas, that we've got some rise in sessions because a lot of people tend to take time off.
I know you mentioned...
I think it's HSA accounts, people tend to be more active and you guys qualify.
So that might be a consideration here, but promising to see that that content is getting picked up.
One thing I flagged last week that we are also continuing to work on is indexing.
So Google, I was doing a review of GA4 data.
Google has like crawled and recognized a lot of the blog content, but it hasn't indexed it, which is somewhat limiting visibility.
We're submitting a bunch of those.
get like 10 per week that we can submit and they're getting indexed in under a day by the time we submit that.
So that should significantly help traffic as well.
I blasted through a lot of that.
Do you have any questions, anything outstanding that you wanted to chat about?
No, if you could just drop this link in the chat.
I think I can then go through and I'll make sure we add in.
to those five articles that are in staging now and get those pushed out.
Okay, awesome.
Yeah, and we should have another batch of four, if not more, by next week for you as well.
Okay, great.
And then I know we had originally talked about shifting meetings to biweekly with renewal conversations and things coming up.
It might make sense for us to meet on more of a weekly basis.
I don't know what capacity looks like for you if you've got a preference around meeting times and such.
I mean, this time is fine with me, like up to you guys, but yeah, we can just, if there's like, we can figure out through Slack, whatever's easiest.
Yeah, if discussion is needed.
Awesome.
Sounds good.
Anything else top of mind before I head out, I'll send this over to you with, and also give you an update when we get all that linking done.
with Okay, Bye you.
Uh, no.
I think that's it for now.
Cool.
Well, thank you for your time, Brian.
Appreciate it.
Thank you.
Yeah.
Bye.
Bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, new regulatory process, and renewal.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Renewal Proposal:** A revised proposal with a growth strategy and milestones is due today to guide the renewal decision.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [**New Regulatory Process:** A new automated review process is in final testing, aiming for \>95% compliance to reduce Biologica's manual review lift.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline:** 5 articles are staged for Brian's final review; the link-checking backlog will be cleared by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - **Performance:** Blog sessions are rising, but Google indexing is a bottleneck. GrowthX is manually submitting 10 URLs/week, which index in \<1 day.

## Topics

### Renewal & Growth Strategy

  - [**Revised Proposal:** A new proposal is due today to guide the renewal discussion.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
      - [**Content:** Includes a growth strategy and clear milestones.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - [**Purpose:** To provide a roadmap for Biologica's go/no-go decision.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Shifting to weekly syncs (from bi-weekly) to support renewal discussions.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

### Content Pipeline & Backlog

  - [**Staged Articles:** 5 articles are ready for Brian's final review.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [**Blocker:** GrowthX publishing team lacks CMS access to select products.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [**Solution:** Brian will manually add products to unblock publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**Link Checking Backlog:** All pending articles will be cleared by next week.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX is using Airtable to track articles "returned for link checking."](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** A large batch is due today, with the remainder next week.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

### New Regulatory Review Process

  - [**Status:** In final testing.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [**Function:** An automated pre-MD review step to catch compliance issues early.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [**Key Checks:**](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Problematic words (based on Biologica's docs & Maggie's prompts)](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Disease language](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Hedging phrases for research claims](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
      - [Mismatch detection for studies/dosages](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [**Goal:** Achieve \>95% compliance before MD review, eliminating major issues.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [**Next Steps:**](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [Test the process on a new article to validate output quality.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
      - [Explore rerunning articles currently with Biologica to reduce their manual review lift.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

### Performance & Indexing

  - [**Blog Sessions:** Uptick in sessions since early December, even over the holidays.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
      - [**Hypothesis:** May be driven by HSA account activity.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [**Google Indexing:** A major bottleneck limiting visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [**Issue:** Content is crawled but not indexed.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - [**Solution:** Manually submitting 10 URLs/week via Google Search Console.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
      - **Result:** Submitted URLs index in \<1 day, proving the method's effectiveness.

## Next Steps

  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
      - [Send revised renewal proposal (today).](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
      - [Send Airtable link for staged articles (today).](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [Send link-checking update (today).](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Brian:**](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
      - [Review 5 staged articles & add products in CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=471.0)
  - [**Both:**](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [Confirm weekly sync time via Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/TsU8Wr9Fkw6k3MvicbFfy13TSdC4dn1i?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)

action_items.description: Send revised renewal proposal to Brian
Post roundup of staged/link-checked articles in channel for Brian
Test regulatory step on new article; assess rerunning articles w/ Brian; set weekly capacity
Share agenda link in chat for Brian
